shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Command palettes, toasts, and other transient overlays only.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Color, background, border, and shadow feedback without layout movement.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Quiet indigo action for launching or confirming work.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--c-accent-quiet); color: var(--c-text); border: 1px solid var(--c-border-strong); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3); font: 600 var(--text-sm) var(--font-sans); transition: background-color 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--c-surface-3); border-color: var(--c-accent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--c-accent); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral compact action for navigation and secondary operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: var(--c-surface-2); color: var(--c-text-muted); border: 1px solid var(--c-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-3); font: var(--text-sm) var(--font-sans); transition: background-color 120ms ease, color 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--c-surface-3); color: var(--c-text); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--c-accent); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Compact neutral field for filtering and short values.
components.css: .ds-input { background: var(--c-surface); color: var(--c-text); border: 1px solid var(--c-border); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: var(--space-1) var(--space-2); font: var(--text-sm) var(--font-sans); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: var(--c-border-strong); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--c-accent); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Selected Navigation Row
components.description: Stable selected state for project and task navigation.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: var(--space-2); width: 220px; background: var(--c-accent-quiet); color: var(--c-text); border: 1px solid var(--c-border-strong); border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: var(--space-2) var(--space-3); font: var(--text-sm) var(--font-sans); text-align: left; } .ds-nav-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--c-accent); } .ds-nav:hover { background: var(--c-surface-3); } .ds-nav:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--c-accent); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: var(--c-accent-quiet); color: var(--c-text); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 2px var(--space-2); font: 600 var(--text-xs) var(--font-sans); }

narrative.overview: Loopfleet is a compact desktop work surface for people supervising autonomous coding work. Tonal near-black layers establish hierarchy without decorative effects; precise spacing, stable controls, and familiar interaction patterns keep attention on tasks and agent state.
keyCharacteristics: Semantic color only for actionable status
Dense logs with clear alignment and minimal padding

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Indigo is the only non-semantic accent and must remain under roughly ten percent of a screen.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Green, amber, and red communicate success, warning, and danger only. They are forbidden as decoration.

rules.name: The Syntax Boundary Rule
rules.body: Markdown delimiters and implementation syntax never appear in user-facing task text.

rules.name: The Tonal Layer Rule
rules.body: Persistent panels never use shadows to compete for attention.

dos: Do preserve the near-black neutral hierarchy and use Control Indigo only for action, focus, and selection.
Do keep all hover and active states spatially stable.
Do use compact rows and familiar native input behavior.
Do normalize authored task text before displaying it.
Do meet WCAG 2.2 AA contrast and support reduced motion.
donts: Don't build cluttered dashboards or use decorative SaaS styling.
Don't imitate a terminal for atmosphere.
Don't create gratuitous cards or nest padded containers.
Don't use saturated colors without semantic meaning.
Don't let hover effects move surrounding content.
Don't use awkward custom form controls where a familiar stepper or select is clearer.
Don't expose raw Markdown such as ** in task labels, headers, or run context.
